feat.name: Second Wind
feat.text: You can enter a second rage, but afterward you need to catch your breath. When you Rage, you can choose to gain temporary HP from the Rage even if 1 minute hasn't passed (or a full turn if you have the revitalizing rage class feature). If you do, once this Rage ends you become fatigued until you rest for 10 minutes.

traits.name: Barbarian
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the barbarian class.
